Providing more information will help the: Providing more information will help the community understand the purpose of your proposal and make informed voting decisions. Include details such as motivation, a detailed description, or any other relevant information.
Proposals represent your ideas as a valu: Proposals represent your ideas as a valued member of the DAO community, aimed at enhancing or modifying aspects of the ecosystem. Each proposal undergoes a voting process, and upon approval, is brought to life.

Proposals are based on smart contracts t: Proposals are based on smart contracts that will be executed. Select the action that you proposal will trigger if succeed in the voting session.

Incoming proposals are proposals that ar: Incoming proposals are proposals that are not yet active
Past proposals are proposals that have b: Past proposals are proposals that have been completed
Waiting for the round to start: Waiting for the round to start
Show your support to this proposal by co: Show your support to this proposal by contributing with your VOT3 tokens, allowing it to be up for voting on Round {{round}}
For a proposal to make it to a public vo: For a proposal to make it to a public vote, it must achieve community support. You can collaborate with this proposal by temporarily contributing some VOT3 tokens.
You will be able to get those tokens bac: You will be able to get those tokens back when the round is over.
